meta.mission: Transform thesis-study-plan into full 15-week (75 sessions × 2h = 150h) thesis prep program with SOTA content, Plan tab, weekly research loop, morning briefing integration. See NIGHT_SHIFT_THESIS_PREP_SPEC.md.

tasks.title: Generate study-plan/sessions.json with 75 sessions
tasks.description: Create study-plan/sessions.json covering 2026-04-20 to 2026-08-01 (weekdays only). 75 session objects: {id, date, week, phase, chapter, title, objectives[], materials[], paper_refs[], exercises[], sota_note, duration_min: 120}. Follow phase breakdown from spec §1. Each session has specific learning objectives tied to chapter content + 1 SOTA addendum.

tasks.title: SOTA content: Ch 2.1 Anonymous Credentials + BBS+/PS signatures
tasks.description: Create sota-ch21.js with 2024-2026 SOTA: BBS+ RFC draft, threshold BBS+, zk-creds, PrivacyPass, rerandomizable PS refinements. Each entry: title, authors, venue, year, link, 2-paragraph recap, math highlight (KaTeX), 'why-for-thesis' note. Use WebSearch + arxiv MCP for recent papers.

tasks.title: SOTA content: Ch 2.2 Confidential TX + Bulletproofs++
tasks.description: Create sota-ch22.js: Bulletproofs++, Flashproofs refinements, Binius range proofs, ElGamal veiled TX (Aptos 2024). Same structure as T2.

tasks.title: SOTA content: Ch 2.3 TEE + attestation
tasks.description: Create sota-ch23.js: Intel TDX 2025 production, NVIDIA H100/H200 confidential compute, Nitro Enclaves v2, Mysten Seal architecture, recent side-channel CVEs (Downfall, Inception).

tasks.title: SOTA content: Ch 2.4 Private Payments
tasks.description: Create sota-ch24.js: Penumbra mainnet 2024-2025, Aztec 3.0 + Noir client-side proving, Namada multichain, Silent Payments Bitcoin.

tasks.title: SOTA content: Ch 2.5 ZK Proof Systems (folding + Plonky3 + Binius)
tasks.description: Create sota-ch25.js: Nova/SuperNova/HyperNova/ProtoStar folding, Plonky3 release, Binius, Halo2/PSE divergence, Ligero/Brakedown 2025, GKR revival. Heavy on benchmarks.

tasks.title: SOTA content: Ch 2.6 Advanced (MPC/FHE/threshold)
tasks.description: Create sota-ch26.js: Threshold FHE (OpenFHE 2025, Zama Concrete), Silent MPC (Pianissimo), PSI (Apple 2024), threshold crypto advances.

tasks.title: SOTA content: Rust track additions
tasks.description: Create sota-rust.js: arkworks 2025, halo2_proofs + plonky3 idioms, nova-snark/Sonobe integration, async crypto for Sui Move FFI.

tasks.title: Plan tab: plan.js renderer
tasks.description: Create plan.js: loads sessions.json, renders 15-week × 5-day grid, color-coded cells by chapter, click → detail modal with objectives/materials/exercises, completion checkbox with localStorage key 'plan:session:<id>', progress bars (overall + this week), streak counter. Deep-link via ?session=<id>.

tasks.title: Plan tab: plan.css grid + modal styles
tasks.description: Create plan.css: 15-col × 5-row grid, per-chapter accent colors matching existing palette, modal overlay, progress-bar styles, responsive (mobile stack). Dark theme consistent with style.css.

tasks.title: Plan tab: index.html nav + section + app.js integration
tasks.description: Edit index.html: add Plan nav button between Method and search, add plan-section. Edit app.js: handle Plan tab activation, P/N keyboard shortcuts (P opens Plan, N jumps to next uncompleted), initialize plan.js, session completion tracking. Load plan.js and plan.css.

tasks.title: Integrate SOTA data files into chapter tabs
tasks.description: Edit index.html and chapter sections to include sota-ch21.js..sota-ch26.js and sota-rust.js. Add renderer hook in paper-guide.js or new sota-renderer.js to display SOTA cards within each chapter tab. Update search.js to index SOTA content.

tasks.title: UX heuristics: readingMinutes + prerequisite links + print stylesheet
tasks.description: Add readingMinutes field across existing study cards (estimate from word count). Add 'prerequisites' field on paper cards with links to other concepts. Create print.css for ?print=session-<id> single-session A4 sheet. Add 'What's new' badge reading from research-log entries of last 7 days.

tasks.title: UX heuristics: smart search + weekly review modal + dual Pomodoro
tasks.description: Update search.js: boost recent results (from research-log timestamps), show chapter+phase alongside. Add weekly-review modal auto-opening Fridays with 10-min checklist. Add 50/10 Pomodoro preset for Plan tab (keep existing 25/5 for chapters).

tasks.title: Research log infrastructure: dir + queue + today entry
tasks.description: Create research-log/ directory with README explaining the flow. Create research-log/TEMPLATE.md and today's entry research-log/2026-04-17.md (seeded with 4 topics). Create research-queue.md with prioritized SOTA topics not yet integrated (10-20 items).

tasks.title: Weekly update script
tasks.description: Create scripts/weekly-update.sh (executable): reads research-log/ entries of last 7 days, extracts new findings into chapter data files, regenerates search index, commits with conventional message, pushes to main. Document invocation in README.md.

tasks.title: Morning briefing addon — thesis research digest
tasks.description: Create ~/.claude/skills/morning-thesis-addon/skill.md that can be invoked by the existing morning briefing. It reads research-log/ last 7 days + study-plan/sessions.json for today's session + research-queue.md next SOTA topic. Document how to wire into existing briefing.

tasks.title: Functional QA + deploy
tasks.description: Run Puppeteer QA on locally served index.html: verify Plan tab renders grid, modals open, completion persists, keyboard shortcuts work, SOTA cards appear in chapters, no regression on existing tabs/search/Pomodoro. Screenshots for each major view. Then merge feat branch to main and confirm Vercel redeploy succeeds.

functional_verification.method: Puppeteer navigation + localhost serving of index.html + verify Vercel prod deployment after merge

decisions.reason: User chose this cadence via AskUserQuestion. Leaves weekends free, matches EPFL Master prep workload.

decisions.decision: Sessions live in thesis-study-plan repo as JSON + Plan tab on site
decisions.reason: User chose this over separate repo. Keeps study material and plan co-located; plan accessible from deployed site.

decisions.decision: Phase breakdown: P1 Ch21 (3w), P2 Ch22 (2w), P3 Ch23 (2w), P4 Ch24 (2w), P5 Ch25 (2w), P6 Ch26 (1w), P7 Rust (2w), P8 Synthesis (1w)
decisions.reason: Anonymous Credentials is thesis core → most time. Rust implementation track as penultimate phase for maximal retention before September start.

decisions.decision: SOTA content in separate sota-*.js files rather than inlining into existing ch*-papers-*.js
decisions.reason: Keeps existing chapter data stable; SOTA is additive and can be regenerated from research-queue weekly.

iteration_log.notes: Initialization iteration. Spec written, state initialized, branch created.
